name: Icon
description: Icon wrapper — renders Lucide icons via Blazicons.

api.name: Icon
api.description: Icon wrapper — renders Lucide icons via Blazicons.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Lucide icon name (PascalCase, e.g. "Search", "ChevronDown", "TrendingUp"). Unknown names fall back to a Circle. Use Svg to supply any icon directly (Lucide or any other Blazicons library).

parameters.name: Svg
parameters.description: Direct Blazicons SvgIcon reference — takes precedence over Name. Lets consumers use any icon library (Lucide, Bootstrap, FluentUI, Material, FontAwesome, Ionicons, MDI).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size preset. Sets Tailwind h-{n} w-{n} on the SVG. Defaults to Md (h-4 w-4).

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Accessible name for the icon. When set, the icon is exposed to assistive technology as role="img" with this string as its aria-label (and a <title> for tooltip/hover parity). When left null the icon is treated as decorative and hidden from screen readers via aria-hidden="true" — the correct default for icons that sit beside a visible text label (a button's own text already conveys the meaning). A consumer-supplied role/aria-label/aria-hidden/ aria-labelledby in attributes always wins over these defaults.

source.content: @namespace Lumeo @using Blazicons @code { /// /// Lucide icon name (PascalCase, e.g. "Search", "ChevronDown", "TrendingUp"). /// Unknown names fall back to a Circle. Use to supply any /// icon directly (Lucide or any other Blazicons library). /// [Parameter] public string? Name { get; set; } /// /// Direct Blazicons reference — takes precedence over . /// Lets consumers use any icon library (Lucide, Bootstrap, FluentUI, Material, FontAwesome, Ionicons, MDI). /// [Parameter] public SvgIcon? Svg { get; set; } /// Size preset. Sets Tailwind h-{n} w-{n} on the SVG. Defaults to (h-4 w-4). [Parameter] public Lumeo.Size Size { get; set; } = Lumeo.Size.Md; /// /// Accessible name for the icon. When set, the icon is exposed to assistive /// technology as role="img" with this string as its aria-label /// (and a <title> for tooltip/hover parity). When left null the /// icon is treated as decorative and hidden from screen readers via /// aria-hidden="true" — the correct default for icons that sit beside /// a visible text label (a button's own text already conveys the meaning). /// A consumer-supplied role/aria-label/aria-hidden/ /// aria-labelledby in attributes always wins over these defaults. /// [Parameter] public string? Title { get; set; } [Parameter] public string? Class { get; set; } [Parameter(CaptureUnmatchedValues = true)] public Dictionary? AdditionalAttributes { get; set; } private SvgIcon ResolvedSvg => Svg ?? MapName(Name); private string CssClass => Cx.Merge(SizeClass, Class); // Decorative-by-default a11y: an icon with no Title is hidden from screen // readers (aria-hidden), an icon WITH a Title is announced (role=img + // aria-label). Either way a consumer-supplied aria-*/role attribute wins — // we only fill in what they didn't set, so existing call sites that already // pass aria-hidden / aria-label keep their exact behaviour. private IReadOnlyDictionary? A11yAttributes { get { var consumerSetsAria = AdditionalAttributes is not null && (AdditionalAttributes.ContainsKey("role") || AdditionalAttributes.ContainsKey("aria-label") || AdditionalAttributes.ContainsKey("aria-labelledby") || AdditionalAttributes.ContainsKey("aria-hidden") || AdditionalAttributes.ContainsKey("title")); if (consumerSetsAria) return AdditionalAttributes; var merged = AdditionalAttributes is null ? new Dictionary() : new Dictionary(AdditionalAttributes); if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Title)) { merged["role"] = "img"; merged["aria-label"] = Title; merged["title"] = Title; } else { merged["aria-hidden"] = "true"; } return merged; } } private string SizeClass => Size switch { Lumeo.Size.Xs => "h-3 w-3", Lumeo.Size.Sm => "h-3.5 w-3.5", Lumeo.Size.Lg => "h-5 w-5", Lumeo.Size.Xl => "h-6 w-6", _ => "h-4 w-4", }; // Common UI icon name → Lucide mapping. Covers the set used across Lumeo's // own components plus the typical app chrome vocabulary. Unknown names fall // back to Circle — consumers can always pass `Svg` directly for uncommon icons. private static SvgIcon MapName(string? name) => name switch { null or "" => Lucide.Circle, "Accessibility" => Lucide.Accessibility, "Activity" => Lucide.Activity, "AlertCircle" or "CircleAlert" => Lucide.CircleAlert, "AlertTriangle" or "TriangleAlert" => Lucide.TriangleAlert, "AlignCenter" => Lucide.AlignCenterHorizontal, "AlignLeft" => Lucide.AlignStartHorizontal, "AlignRight" => Lucide.AlignEndHorizontal, "Apple" => Lucide.Apple, "Archive" => Lucide.Archive, "ArrowDown" => Lucide.ArrowDown, "ArrowLeft" => Lucide.ArrowLeft, "ArrowLeftRight" => Lucide.ArrowLeftRight, "ArrowRight" => Lucide.ArrowRight, "ArrowUp" => Lucide.ArrowUp, "ArrowUpDown" => Lucide.ArrowUpDown, "ArrowUpRight" => Lucide.ArrowUpRight, "AtSign" => Lucide.AtSign, "BadgeCheck" => Lucide.BadgeCheck, "BarChart2" or "BarChart3" or "ChartBar" => Lucide.ChartBar, "Bell" => Lucide.Bell, "BellOff" => Lucide.BellOff, "Blocks" => Lucide.Blocks, "Bold" => Lucide.Bold, "BookOpen" => Lucide.BookOpen, "Bookmark" => Lucide.Bookmark, "BookmarkCheck" => Lucide.BookmarkCheck, "Box" => Lucide.Box, "Building" or "Building2" => Lucide.Building2, "Calendar" => Lucide.Calendar, "CalendarDays" => Lucide.CalendarDays, "CalendarPlus" => Lucide.CalendarPlus, "Camera" => Lucide.Camera, "Check" => Lucide.Check, "CheckCheck" => Lucide.CheckCheck, "CheckCircle" or "CheckCircle2" or "CircleCheck" => Lucide.CircleCheck, "CheckSquare" => Lucide.SquareCheck, "ChevronDown" => Lucide.ChevronDown, "ChevronLeft" => Lucide.ChevronLeft, "ChevronRight" => Lucide.ChevronRight, "ChevronUp" => Lucide.ChevronUp, "ChevronsUpDown" => Lucide.ChevronsUpDown, "Chrome" => Lucide.Globe, "Circle" => Lucide.Circle, "CircleDot" => Lucide.CircleDot, "Clipboard" => Lucide.Clipboard, "ClipboardList" => Lucide.ClipboardList, "Clock" => Lucide.Clock, "Cloud" => Lucide.Cloud, "Code" => Lucide.Code, "Code2" => Lucide.Code, "Cog" => Lucide.Cog, "Columns3" => Lucide.Columns3, "Compass" => Lucide.Compass, "Component" => Lucide.Component, "Cookie" => Lucide.Cookie, "Copy" => Lucide.Copy, "CornerUpLeft" => Lucide.CornerUpLeft, "CreditCard" => Lucide.CreditCard, "Database" => Lucide.Database, "Disc" or "Disc2" => Lucide.Disc2, "DollarSign" => Lucide.DollarSign, "Download" => Lucide.Download, "Edit" or "Pencil" => Lucide.Pencil, "Ellipsis" => Lucide.Ellipsis, "ExternalLink" => Lucide.ExternalLink, "Eye" => Lucide.Eye, "EyeOff" => Lucide.EyeOff, "FileCode" => Lucide.FileCode, "FileEdit" => Lucide.FilePen, "FileText" => Lucide.FileText, "Filter" => Lucide.Funnel, "Flag" => Lucide.Flag, "Folder" => Lucide.Folder, "FolderGit" or "FolderGit2" => Lucide.FolderGit2, "FolderOpen" => Lucide.FolderOpen, "FolderPlus" => Lucide.FolderPlus, "FolderUp" => Lucide.FolderUp, "Forward" => Lucide.Forward, "Github" => Lucide.Github, "Globe" or "Globe2" => Lucide.Globe, "Hammer" => Lucide.Hammer, "Heading1" => Lucide.Heading1, "Heading2" => Lucide.Heading2, "Heading3" => Lucide.Heading3, "Heart" => Lucide.Heart, "Home" or "House" => Lucide.House, "Image" => Lucide.Image, "Inbox" => Lucide.Inbox, "Info" => Lucide.Info, "Italic" => Lucide.Italic, "Key" => Lucide.Key, "Keyboard" => Lucide.Keyboard, "Languages" => Lucide.Languages, "Layers" => Lucide.Layers, "LayoutDashboard" => Lucide.LayoutDashboard, "LayoutGrid" => Lucide.LayoutGrid, "LayoutList" => Lucide.LayoutList, "LayoutTemplate" => Lucide.LayoutTemplate, "Lightbulb" => Lucide.Lightbulb, "LineChart" => Lucide.ChartLine, "Link" => Lucide.Link, "Link2Off" or "Unlink" => Lucide.Link2Off, "List" => Lucide.List, "ListMusic" => Lucide.ListMusic, "ListOrdered" => Lucide.ListOrdered, "Loader" => Lucide.Loader, "LoaderCircle" => Lucide.LoaderCircle, "Lock" => Lucide.Lock, "LogIn" => Lucide.LogIn, "LogOut" => Lucide.LogOut, "Mail" => Lucide.Mail, "MapPin" => Lucide.MapPin, "Menu" or "MenuSquare" => Lucide.Menu, "MessageCircle" => Lucide.MessageCircle, "MessageSquare" => Lucide.MessageSquare, "Mic" => Lucide.Mic, "Minus" => Lucide.Minus, "Monitor" => Lucide.Monitor, "Moon" => Lucide.Moon, "MoreHorizontal" => Lucide.Ellipsis, "MousePointerClick" => Lucide.MousePointerClick, "MousePointerSquareDashed" or "SquareMousePointer" => Lucide.SquareMousePointer, "Music" => Lucide.Music, "Navigation" => Lucide.Navigation, "Package" => Lucide.Package, "Paintbrush" => Lucide.Paintbrush, "Palette" => Lucide.Palette, "PanelLeft" => Lucide.PanelLeft, "PanelLeftClose" or "SidebarClose" => Lucide.PanelLeftClose, "PanelLeftOpen" or "SidebarOpen" => Lucide.PanelLeftOpen, "Paperclip" => Lucide.Paperclip, "Pause" => Lucide.Pause, "PenLine" => Lucide.PenLine, "Phone" => Lucide.Phone, "PieChart" => Lucide.ChartPie, "Pilcrow" => Lucide.Pilcrow, "Pin" => Lucide.Pin, "Play" => Lucide.Play, "Plus" => Lucide.Plus, "Puzzle" => Lucide.Puzzle, "Quote" => Lucide.Quote, "Radio" => Lucide.Radio, "Redo" => Lucide.Redo, "RefreshCw" => Lucide.RefreshCw, "RemoveFormatting" => Lucide.RemoveFormatting, "Repeat" => Lucide.Repeat, "Rocket" => Lucide.Rocket, "RotateCcw" => Lucide.RotateCcw, "Search" => Lucide.Search, "SearchX" => Lucide.SearchX, "Send" => Lucide.Send, "Server" => Lucide.Server, "ServerCog" => Lucide.ServerCog, "Settings" => Lucide.Settings, "Settings2" => Lucide.Settings2, "Share" or "Share2" => Lucide.Share2, "Shield" => Lucide.Shield, "ShieldAlert" => Lucide.ShieldAlert, "ShieldCheck" => Lucide.ShieldCheck, "ShieldOff" => Lucide.ShieldAlert, "ShoppingBag" => Lucide.ShoppingBag, "ShoppingCart" => Lucide.ShoppingCart, "Shuffle" => Lucide.Shuffle, "SkipBack" => Lucide.SkipBack, "SkipForward" => Lucide.SkipForward, "Slash" => Lucide.Slash, "SlidersHorizontal" => Lucide.SlidersHorizontal, "Smartphone" => Lucide.Smartphone, "Smile" => Lucide.Smile, "Sparkles" => Lucide.Sparkles, "Square" => Lucide.Square, "SquareCode" => Lucide.SquareCode, "SquarePen" => Lucide.SquarePen, "Star" => Lucide.Star, "Strikethrough" => Lucide.Strikethrough, "Sun" => Lucide.Sun, "Table" or "Table2" => Lucide.Table, "Tag" => Lucide.Tag, "Target" => Lucide.Target, "Terminal" => Lucide.Terminal, "TerminalSquare" or "SquareTerminal" => Lucide.SquareTerminal, "TestTube" => Lucide.TestTube, "Trash" or "Trash2" => Lucide.Trash2, "TrendingDown" => Lucide.TrendingDown, "TrendingUp" => Lucide.TrendingUp, "Truck" => Lucide.Truck, "Underline" => Lucide.Underline, "Undo" => Lucide.Undo, "Upload" => Lucide.Upload, "User" => Lucide.User, "UserMinus" => Lucide.UserMinus, "UserPlus" => Lucide.UserPlus, "Users" => Lucide.Users, "Video" => Lucide.Video, "Volume" => Lucide.Volume, "Volume1" => Lucide.Volume1, "Volume2" => Lucide.Volume2, "Wallet" => Lucide.Wallet, "Wand" => mdSummary:
# Icon

Icon wrapper — renders Lucide icons via Blazicons.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/icon

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Icon | Name | `string?` | `` | Lucide icon name (PascalCase, e.g. "Search", "ChevronDown", "TrendingUp"). Unknown names fall back to a Circle. Use Svg to supply any icon directly (Lucide or any other Blazicons library). |
| Icon | Svg | `SvgIcon?` | `` | Direct Blazicons SvgIcon reference — takes precedence over Name. Lets consumers use any icon library (Lucide, Bootstrap, FluentUI, Material, FontAwesome, Ionicons, MDI). |
| Icon | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Size preset. Sets Tailwind h-{n} w-{n} on the SVG. Defaults to Md (h-4 w-4). |
| Icon | Title | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the icon. When set, the icon is exposed to assistive technology as role="img" with this string as its aria-label (and a <title> for tooltip/hover parity). When left null the icon is treated as decorative and hidden from screen readers via aria-hidden="true" — the correct default for icons that sit beside a visible text label (a button's own text already conveys the meaning). A consumer-supplied role/aria-label/aria-hidden/ aria-labelledby in attributes always wins over these defaults. |
| Icon | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Icon | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Icon />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Icon/Icon.razor`
